content.problemStatement:
A new TV streaming service was recently started in Chefland called the Chef-TV.

A group of NNN friends in Chefland want to buy Chef-TV subscriptions. We know that 666 people can share one Chef-TV subscription. Also, the cost of one Chef-TV subscription is XXX rupees.
Determine the minimum total cost that the group of NNN friends will incur so that everyone in the group is able to use Chef-TV.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT — the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first and only line of each test case contains two integers NNN and XXX — the size of the group of friends and the cost of one subscription.


Output Format
For each test case, output the minimum total cost that the group will incur so that everyone in the group is able to use Chef-TV.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1: There is only one person in the group. Therefore he will have to buy 111 subscription. Therefore the total cost incurred is 100100100.
Test case 2: There are 121212 people in the group. Therefore they will have to buy 222 subscriptions. Therefore the total cost incurred is 500500500.
Test case 3: There are 161616 people in the group. Therefore they will have to buy 333 subscriptions. Therefore the total cost incurred is 405405405.
